imagePrompt: Flat vector illustration of a minimalist father silhouette standing casually on a dock, fishing rod extended over the water, with a simple ripple effect where the line drops. Bold stacked typography above and below reads 'FISHING DAD' (top) and 'BECAUSE THE FISH DON'T ARGUE BACK' (bottom), clean sans-serif type. printReadyPrompt: Typography-first design: 'FISHING DAD: BECAUSE THE FISH DON'T ARGUE BACK' in bold sans-serif. Crisp dark navy outline on all elements, stroke weights 2-3px, fills in mid-tone teal, burnt orange, and electric blue accents for pop. Stands out on both light and dark backgrounds.
